Package de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.prooftree

Class ProofTreeViewFilter

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.prooftree.ProofTreeViewFilter
public abstract class ProofTreeViewFilter extends Object
Filters for the proof tree view.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final ProofTreeViewFilter[]
    ALL
    All ProofTreeViewFilters.
    static final ProofTreeViewFilter[]
    ALL_GLOBAL_FILTERS
    All ProofTreeViewFilters that operate on whole subtrees, as opposed to ProofTreeViewFilter.NodeFilters, which operate on single nodes.
    static final ProofTreeViewFilter
    HIDE_CLOSED_SUBTREES
    Hide Closed Subtrees
    static final ProofTreeViewFilter
    HIDE_INTERACTIVE_GOALS
    Hide Subtrees Whose Goals are Interactive.
    static final ProofTreeViewFilter

    static final ProofTreeViewFilter
    ONLY_INTERACTIVE
    Hide Non-interactive Proofsteps.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProofTreeViewFilter

      public ProofTreeViewFilter()

  • Method Details

    • hiddenByGlobalFilters

      public static boolean hiddenByGlobalFilters(Node node)
      Parameters:
      node - a node.
      Returns:
      true iff the subtree starting at node is hidden by an active global filter.

    • name

      public abstract String name()
      Returns:
      the name of the filter used in GUI elements.

    • showSubtree

      public abstract boolean showSubtree(Node node)
      Parameters:
      node - a node.
      Returns:
      false iff the subtree starting at node is hidden by this filter.

    • isActive

      public abstract boolean isActive()
      Returns:
      whether the filter is currently active.

    • addToProofTreeView

      public boolean addToProofTreeView()
      Returns:
      whether this filter should be added to the ProofTreeView
